title: SRE: design an SLO for a checkout journey
task: Pick the right SLI for the /checkout submit journey, set a 28-day error-budget-grounded target, and document the measurement.
baseline_prompt: Design an SLO for the /checkout submit journey. What should we measure, what target, and how do we monitor it?
polymath_prompt: Use Polymath SRE slo-design. Pick the right SLI for the /checkout submit critical user journey, set the threshold by 28-day error-budget arithmetic, and document the measurement.
